title: Migrate to Grafana Cloud with the Migration Assistant

blocks.content: The Grafana Cloud Migration Assistant automates moving dashboards, data sources, folders, plugins, library panels, and alerting resources from a self-managed Grafana instance to Grafana Cloud.

This journey spans two Grafana instances. The **Cloud** guide covers token generation and resource verification on your Grafana Cloud stack. The **Self-managed** guide covers connecting, building a snapshot, and uploading resources from your on-premise instance.

Ensure you have:

- Grafana server administrator access on the self-managed instance
- Admin role access on your Grafana Cloud stack
- Internet access from the self-managed instance
- A single-replica deployment (scale down HA setups before migrating)
